zh.Saint Mawgan, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬根
zh.St Ervan, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 艾萬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Arundell II於大約1294年出生在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾時，他的父親Sir John Arundell I24歲，母親Joan Soor23歲。他於大約1310年與Isabel Bere在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1379年在愛爾蘭享年87歲。

zh-hans.St Ervan, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 艾萬
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Arundell II于大约1294年出生在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾时，他的父亲Sir John Arundell I24岁，母亲Joan Soor23岁。他于大约1310年与Isabel Bere在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1379年在爱尔兰享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Arundell II was born about 1294, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John Arundell I, was 24 and his mother, Joan Soor, was 23. He married Isabel Bere about 1310, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1379, in Ireland, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Arundell II est né environ 1294, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Arundell I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Soor, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Bere environ 1310, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1379, à Irlande, à l’âge de 87 ans.

Er hat um 1310 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Isabel Bere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1379 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell II è nato il circa 1294 nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John Arundell I, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan Soor, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Bere circa 1310, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1379, nel Irlanda, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell IIが約1294年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Arundell Iは24歳，母Joan Soorは23歳であった。約1310年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでIsabel Bereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1379年にアイルランドで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell II(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Arundell I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Soor(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Isabel Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1379년 아일랜드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Isabel Bere aproximadamente 1310, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1379, em Irlanda, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Arundell II родился около 1294 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Arundell I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Soor, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Bere около 1310 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1379 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 87 лет.
